final_prompt.prompt:
Create a UI mockup for an e-commerce landing page hero section for LUMEA BEAUTY, a Japanese skincare brand.

Style/medium: clean flat UI mockup, bright and airy aesthetic, feminine beauty brand design, floral accents with purple flowers, soft pink and white color palette
Composition: desktop browser viewport layout, header navigation bar at top with 5 links, hero section split into three columns (left text content, center model, right product display), benefit cards row at bottom
Subject: young East Asian woman smiling and touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of moisturizing boost serum, dropper bottle and packaging box displayed
Scene/backdrop: clean white background with soft purple floral accents, minimal studio environment
Lighting/mood: soft diffused lighting, bright and welcoming atmosphere
Color palette: soft pink as primary accent, white as base, purple floral details, gold accents for stat cards
Text (verbatim): "LUMEA BEAUTY", "特徴", "成分", "お客様の声", "使い方", "FAQ", "今すぐ試す", "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。", "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。", "敏感肌OK", "高保湿", "朝晩使える", "美容成分をしっかり届ける", "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ", "続けやすいシンプルケア", "初回限定で試してみる >", "成分をチェック >", "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし", "満足度 96%", "美容成分 5種配合", "愛用者 12,000人突破", "うるおい", "透明感", "使いやすさ"
Materials/textures: smooth white UI cards with subtle shadows, pill-shaped badges, floating rounded rectangles with gold accents, clean vector icons
Constraints: must be a functional-looking UI layout with clear hierarchy, all Japanese text must be legible, navigation and CTA buttons must be visually distinct
Avoid: cluttered layout, dark themes, aggressive sales aesthetics, stock photo watermarks, deformed hands or faces
